---
title: "Code"
---
```{=html}
<div class="code-section">
<h3>R Packages</h3>
<p class="code-section-intro">Packages and research tools for econometrics, distributional methods, and spatial or clustered-data applications.</p>
<div class="code-list">
  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>icmkit <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/icmkit">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>Provides tools for Integrated Conditional Moment (ICM) estimation and specification testing in linear and nonlinear regression settings.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>estrpac <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/estrpac">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>A working package that temporarily hosts routines used in my research.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>cluscov <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=cluscov">CRAN</a>] [<a href="https://estsyawo.github.io/cluscov/">Website</a>] [<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/cluscov">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>With Abdul-Nasah Soale. Implements clustered covariate regression methods for linear and nonlinear models, including settings with rank-deficient design matrices.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>bayesdistreg <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=bayesdistreg">CRAN</a>] [<a href="https://estsyawo.github.io/bayesdistreg/index.html">Website</a>] [<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/bayesdistreg">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>With Weige Huang. Provides routines for Bayesian distribution regression, including non-asymptotic, semi-asymptotic, and asymptotic estimators used in related research.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="code-section">
<h3>C Projects</h3>
<p class="code-section-intro">Lower-level implementations intended to expose computational details and support faster model estimation.</p>
<div class="code-list">
  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>metricsC <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/metricsC">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>A collection of portable C routines for econometric model estimation. The project emphasizes low-level implementation, computational intuition, and performance, with test programs included for complete C execution.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>RdotC <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/RdotC">GitHub</a>] [<a href="https://estsyawo.github.io/RdotC/index.html">Website</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>Provides C routines callable from R for econometric and statistical model estimation, useful both as building blocks and for speed improvements.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="code-section">
<h3>Fortran</h3>
<p class="code-section-intro">Numerical routines for econometric modeling in a high-performance compiled environment.</p>
<div class="code-list">
  <div class="code-item">
    <h4>metricsFortran <span class="code-links">[<a href="https://github.com/estsyawo/metricsFortran">GitHub</a>]</span></h4>
    <p>Contains Fortran subroutines for econometric model estimation, with an emphasis on performance, numerical efficiency, and low-level understanding of common econometric procedures.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

<!--
### **Matlab**

### **Octave**

### **Stata**
-->
